untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Fundamental value estimate' which is not a calculable indicator in the allowed set. The rule depends on external fundamental value calculations not derivable from price/volume/technical indicators. Position sizing based on mispricing magnitude also cannot be translated without access to fundamental value inputs.
translation_notes: Attempted to structure entry/exit around the 0.85 and 1.15 thresholds as multipliers, but these represent ratios against an external 'Fundamental value estimate' parameter that is not available in the allowed indicators. The core signal is untranslatable without a fundamental value oracle or model. The confidence condition ('HIGH confidence in fundamental value estimate') also cannot be operationalized with available indicators.
